## Type of Change

- [ ] New component
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Enhancement

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Storybook builds (`pnpm --filter @arctech/storybook build-storybook`)
- [ ] Visual review in Storybook

## Checklist

- [ ] Changeset added (if applicable): `pnpm changeset`
- [ ] Design tokens updated if colors/spacing changed
- [ ] All framework wrappers updated
- [ ] Stories added/updated
